headline: AvidXchange Completes Workday Integration

headline: Workday Expands Public Sector Footprint in Canada as Government Accelerates AI Modernization
summary: Workday, Inc. (NASDAQ: WDAY), the enterprise AI platform for HR, finance, and IT, today announced accelerated customer momentum in Canada's public sector as more institutions turn to Workday to modernize HR and finance for an AI-powered future.
